name: Biceps Brachii (& Brachialis)

landmarks.notes: Receives meaningful indirect work from all pulling; count some pulling volume as fractional biceps volume. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: ~2x/week direct, on top of back-day involvement.
training_notes: Train the long head at length (incline or overhead-elbow curls) and include a supinated curl. Brachialis benefits from hammer/neutral-grip work.
